title: Short title
doc_html:
SUBPART I.  HEALTH MAINTENANCE ORGANIZATIONS

§241.  Short title

This Subpart may be cited as the Health Maintenance Organization Act.

Acts 1986, No. 1065, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 22:2001 by Acts 2008, No. 415, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2009.

NOTE:  Former R.S. 22:241 redesignated as R.S. 22:1214 by Acts 2008, No. 415, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2009.
